title: Amtech S3260 50m x 10mm polypropylene rope
features: DURABLE: This durable 50m (165ft) x 10mm (0.4") high visibility rope is made from from multi-filament braided polypropylene
VERSATILE: It is ideal for many applications around the home, garden, workshop or garage
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Rope See more
